rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §276.005, which governs a voter's privilege from arrest during elections. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A voter may not be arrested during the voter's attendance at an election and while going to and returning from a polling place except for treason, a felony, or a breach of peace.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
